title: gibbaeum nebrownii subsp. nebrownii
intro: Gibbaeum nebrownii subsp. nebrownii, also known as the 'Living Rock', is a succulent plant species that belongs to the family Aizoaceae. It is a type of succulent that stores water in its leaves, which helps it to survive in arid environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gibbaeum nebrownii subsp. nebrownii include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and protecting against cell damage; it can be prepared as a herbal tea or applied topically as an ointment or salve.
